nibs_position_id.Description: Identifier of one element placement (one row). Referenced from nibs_position_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

nibs_element_id.Description: Element placed at this position. Links to nibs_element_id in *_nibs.tsv.

position_description.Description: Free-text description of the placement and how it was located.

element_centre_x.Description: x component of the centre of the element.

element_centre_y.Description: y component of the centre of the element.

element_centre_z.Description: z component of the centre of the element.

element_xdir_x.Description: x component of the element x axis. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_xdir_y.Description: y component of the element x axis. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_xdir_z.Description: z component of the element x axis. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_ydir_x.Description: x component of the element y axis, running along the handle. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_ydir_y.Description: y component of the element y axis, running along the handle. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_ydir_z.Description: z component of the element y axis, running along the handle. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_zdir_x.Description: x component of the element z axis, pointing from the element into the head. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_zdir_y.Description: y component of the element z axis, pointing from the element into the head. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

element_zdir_z.Description: z component of the element z axis, pointing from the element into the head. Unit vector; the three axes are mutually orthogonal and right-handed (xdir = ydir x zdir).

target_x.Description: x coordinate of the intended cortical target. Optional and secondary to the element placement.

target_y.Description: y coordinate of the intended cortical target. Optional and secondary to the element placement.

target_z.Description: z coordinate of the intended cortical target. Optional and secondary to the element placement.
